orchestrator_status.build_urgency: CRITICAL — must be built BEFORE Batch 6 Day 3 (estimated 2026-06-05). No Batch 6 LinkedIn without orchestrator.py deployed and tested.
orchestrator_status.estimated_complexity: Medium — BRAIN+HANDS pattern: BRAIN writes search plan + note templates, orchestrator.py reads them and drives Playwright (HANDS) to execute. Core functions: read search_plan, drive Google search via Playwright, extract profile URL, drive LinkedIn connection request + note, write linkedin_profiles.json entry immediately after each connection.
minimum_viable_implementation: for each query: drive Playwright to Google, extract LinkedIn profile URL
confirm profile is owner (not employee) before proceeding
check posts from last 60 days — flag if post found
read note template from data/linkedin_connection_notes.json (post_reference or generic)
drive LinkedIn connection request + note via Playwright
write linkedin_profiles.json entry immediately after each connection (not batched)
log errors and skip reasons — never crash silently
orchestrator_status.impact_of_not_building: Same outcome as Batch 5: 59-session failure. £800-1,175 written off. No recovery. CANNOT happen again.
